title: Eltroplectris cogniauxiana
taxonomy: Eltroplectris cogniauxiana is classified within the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. This family consists of approximately 30,000 known species of orchids, which are widely distributed across the globe. Eltroplectris cogniauxiana is specifically placed within the subfamily Vanilloideae, which is characterized by its unique flower and stem morphology. The genus Eltroplectris itself is part of the tribe Ponerorchideae, a group of orchids known for their distinctive flowers and growth habits. By classifying Eltroplectris cogniauxiana within these taxonomic groups, botanists can better understand its evolutionary history and relationships to other orchid species.

The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in wound healing and the treatment of infections.
